div.p: Extracts the Most Significant Bit (MSB) of each of the 16 bytes and packs them into a single 16-bit integer.
CTZ returns the number of zero bits preceding the least significant set bit.
Success: Null terminator found at offset 5.

ul.li: Constant time complexity O(1) for 16-byte blocks.
Utilizes full width of the ALU.
